beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Acrid smoke drifts across the shattered stone of the Summit. Below, the quiet is broken only by low groans. Kaelen stands at the cliff's edge, scanning the ash-choked valley.
beats.camera: Wide shot, slowly panning across the devastated landscape, then settling on Kaelen's back.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Lyra stares numbly at her blood-flecked hands, clenching them slightly.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Lyra's face and hands.

dialogue.text: We let them march into the bottleneck. We knew they would be slaughtered, and we did nothing.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Master Valerius leans heavily on his chipped blade, his gaze distant.
beats.camera: Medium shot of Valerius, slightly low angle emphasizing his weight.

dialogue.text: We did what was required to preserve the lineage, Lyra. A bitter truth, but the only one that keeps us breathing.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Lyra looks up, her eyes flashing with desperate anger, gesturing with her blood-flecked hands.
beats.camera: Close-up on Lyra's face, slight push-in.

dialogue.text: Is this what the Grand Way teaches? To sacrifice the innocent to buy ourselves another day in the dirt?

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Kaelen turns slowly from the cliff's edge to face Lyra and Valerius.
beats.camera: Medium shot, Kaelen turning to face Lyra and Valerius in the background.

dialogue.text: The defensive line held because the variable of their lives was spent at the optimal moment. However, the victory is mathematically incomplete.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Lyra gestures wildly towards the smoking ruins in the valley below.
beats.camera: Over-the-shoulder shot from behind Kaelen, showing Lyra gesturing towards the valley.

dialogue.text: Incomplete? Look around you, Kaelen! The valley is a grave!

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Kaelen makes a slight, dismissive wave of his hand, maintaining eye contact with Lyra.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, Lyra slightly out of focus in the background.

dialogue.text: The sect's tactical formations were too disciplined for a mere regional uprising. Their replenishment rates suggest a centralized, highly organized source of energy and command. We have severed a finger, but the hand remains active.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Valerius's eyes narrow slowly as understanding dawns on him.

dialogue.text: You suggest a puppet master. A power deeper than the eastern borders.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Kaelen looks directly at Valerius, his stance resolute.
beats.camera: Two-shot, medium close-up of Kaelen and Valerius.

dialogue.text: Correct. If we remain defensive, the next calculation will not favor us. To prevent a recurrence of this resource drain, we must locate and eliminate the origin of the sect.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Lyra's voice cracks with exhaustion, her gaze falling to the ground.
beats.camera: Close-up on Lyra's face, slightly looking down.

dialogue.text: And how many more lives will you balance on your ledger to get to this... this master?

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Kaelen looks directly into Lyra's eyes, his expression flat.
beats.camera: Medium close-up, split diopter showing Kaelen in sharp focus and Lyra's reaction slightly blurred.

dialogue.text: As many as are required to ensure our survival. But if we find the source, it will be the last time we are forced to make this specific trade.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Lyra averts her gaze from Kaelen, her shoulders slumping in bitter defeat.

expression.lyra_blade_of_conviction: bitter defeat, profound disillusionment, reluctant acceptance

beats.camera: Medium close-up on Lyra, Kaelen's back or profile in the foreground.

dialogue.text: I despise your coldness. I despise what we did today. But... I cannot let their deaths be for nothing. I will go.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Master Valerius nods slowly, a somber acceptance in his eyes.

beats.time: Day, immediately following the brutal offensive
beats.action: Kaelen turns back toward the horizon, his perfect memory already cataloging the paths forward.
beats.camera: Medium shot from behind Kaelen, looking out over the scarred landscape. Slow pull-out.
